assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Automatic upgrade to 1.31 when 1.30 reaches End of Support' for Regular channel clusters and describes this as a force-upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Extended channel extends support up to 24 months' and 'No automatic upgrade - Extended channel extends support up to 24 months' indicating they have more time

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states 'Force-upgrade to 1.31 at EoS - no way to avoid except temporary exclusions' and mentions 'Both control plane AND node pools upgraded together' in Regular channel context, indicating forced upgrades for No channel clusters

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response includes 'no upgrades exclusion | 30 days | ALL upgrades' in the table and mentions temporary exclusions can delay EoS upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed action plans, recommends 'Upgrade proactively' as Option B, and includes comprehensive upgrade planning steps rather than just waiting for automatic upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging or EoS notifications as planning tools - this specific monitoring mechanism is not referenced

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Check deprecated API usage (GKE deprecation insights dashboard)' in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly warn against 'snowflaking' or discuss the security and reliability risks of manually freezing versions - it focuses on upgrade controls but doesn't address the anti-pattern of version freezing
